articles.title: Iran must pledge to stop shooting at ships in Strait of Hormuz, US officials say
articles.summary: US media say Iran has told US officials an attack on ships crossing the strait early this week was "a mistake".

articles.title: Spain battles to contain one of its deadliest wildfires as at least 12 killed
articles.summary: At least four Britons are believed to be among the victims of the blaze, which left another 23 people missing.

articles.title: Trump administration subpoenas New York Times journalists over Air Force One reporting
articles.summary: The reporters received the legal summons after they reported on alleged security issues with the president's new plane, which was gifted by Qatar.

articles.title: Indian tourists among 15 killed as speedboat capsizes in Vietnam
articles.summary: Local media say 21 people were saved after the boat overturned in rough seas near an island in south Vietnam.

articles.title: China braced for second typhoon in a week as Bavi approaches landfall
articles.summary: Hundreds of thousands of people are evacuated from eastern Zhejiang province, with the city of Wenzhou close to the path of the storm.

articles.title: More than 40 kidnapped children and teachers freed after Nigerian army operation
articles.summary: "I feel happy and elated… I feel joy," the head of the local teachers' union tells the BBC.

articles.title: South Africa World Cup midfielder Adams dies aged 25
articles.summary: South Africa and Mamelodi Sundowns midfielder Jayden Adams dies at the age of 25, just weeks after featuring for his country at the World Cup.

articles.title: US pays out $3m to victims of mystery Havana Syndrome condition reported by spies
articles.summary: US officials and diplomats and their families began reporting a mysterious illness a decade ago.

articles.title: Landmark US housing bill becomes law despite Trump protest
articles.summary: The president had wanted voter ID legislation passed before the housing law, which aims to reduce costs and increase supply.

articles.title: New dinosaur species as long as cricket pitch discovered in Thailand
articles.summary: The plant-eating dinosaur, named Uragasaurus kalasinensis, is thought to have lived about 150 million years ago.
